pages.text: $(italic)Tinkers' Construct$() — smelting carried into the Nether. The scorched $(italic)Foundry$(), its blocks and fluids, and the alloys that need a hotter world than the overworld can give.$(br2)$(bold)To craft:$() a $(italic)Book$() + $(italic)Nether Grout$().
pages.title: Fantastic Foundry
